name: Split-Flap Display
description: Mechanical split-flap (Solari) board effect — each character flips through the alphabet to reveal the target text.
accessibility_notes: final text should be in aria-label for screen readers
rapid DOM updates during flip — use aria-live cautiously

flipSpeed.description: Flip interval in ms per character step

stagger.description: Delay between each character starting to flip (ms)

conflicts: long text with fast flipSpeed causes many simultaneous DOM updates
